prediction.reasoning: For a 2-day prediction horizon, I used historical volatility analysis for NFLX. Based on typical daily volatility of ~2-3% for Netflix stock, I estimated the standard deviation of 2-day returns at approximately 2.8%. The point estimate remains at current price assuming no directional bias. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with increasing widths for higher confidence levels (50%: ±1.35%, 80%: ±3.7%, 90%: ±5.1% approximately).
